title: Blooming Creepers
description: adds a meadow variant for creepers
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4445e9feff8b15bac661a82c7be27dce5ed27c62.png)  


> ### **ABOUT**:
Adds a blooming creeper which is a variant of the creeper which is only found in the meadow biome  

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/844a2fac185b1b471d8659d2c0b73b4da2adc69d.png)

--------------------------

**REQUIRES: EMF + ETF or OPTIFINE**

> Extra info ℹ️:   
✦ made this for a spring jam on planetminecraft and this is like the first time I made a texture pack, so don't be surprised if it's shit lol  
✦ I plan to add more stuff into this pack, prob add more variety into the creepers  
✦ will prob make it FA compatible as well  
✦ if you're having any problem or want to suggest new ideas, dm me on discord  
> [ ![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c48d723778d8bde6bb5aa3fc5ca42484880e3c0.png)](https://discordapp.com/users/1190732551501918222)
